name: Kerberos Manipulation
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Kerberos Manipulation
SIGMA Description: Detects failed Kerberos TGT issue operation. This can be a sign of manipulations of TGT messages by an attacker.

False positives:
- Faulty legacy applications

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
TD_list: APPLY Kerberos Manipulation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
